moments.title: British Grand Prix concludes
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 Pirelli British Grand Prix 2026 at Silverstone finished today, July 5th, with Leclerc taking the win for Ferrari and British drivers Russell and Hamilton also on the podium.

angles.name: Race Recap
angles.copy: What a weekend at Silverstone! Leclerc takes the top spot at the British Grand Prix, with our home heroes Russell and Hamilton making it to the podium. What was your highlight?

angles.name: Leclerc's Victory
angles.copy: Ferrari's Charles Leclerc is your British Grand Prix winner! Incredible performance today at Silverstone. Did you catch the action?

angles.name: Home Talent
angles.copy: Huge cheers for George Russell and Lewis Hamilton, both on the podium at the British Grand Prix! A fantastic showing for British talent on home soil.

moments.title: Wimbledon enters second week
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships 2026 continue today, July 5th, with the Fourth Round of matches, running until the finals on July 12th.

angles.name: Middle Sunday Action
angles.copy: It's Fourth Round Sunday at Wimbledon! The second week kicks off with some huge matches. Who are you backing for the quarter-finals?

angles.name: Road to the Finals
angles.copy: The grass court drama continues! Wimbledon is in full swing, building up to the Men's and Ladies' Singles Finals next Sunday, July 12th.

angles.name: Wimbledon Vibes
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream are flowing as Wimbledon heats up! Who's your favourite to lift the trophy this year?

moments.title: Love Supreme Jazz Festival closes
moments.blurb: The Love Supreme Jazz Festival in Glynde Place, East Sussex, concludes today, July 5th, after a weekend featuring acts like De La Soul, Loyle Carner, Ezra Collective, The Temptations & The Four Tops, Gabrielle and Sister Sledge.

angles.name: Festival Wrap
angles.copy: That's a wrap for Love Supreme Jazz Festival! What an incredible weekend of jazz, funk, and soul in East Sussex. Who did you see?

angles.name: Sunday Sounds
angles.copy: The final day of Love Supreme Jazz Festival is bringing the vibes! Catch the last sets from some incredible artists today.

moments.title: Huey Lewis turns 76
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis & The News, known for hits like 'The Power of Love' and 'Heart and Soul', turns 76 today, July 5th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Huey!
angles.copy: Happy 76th Birthday to the legendary Huey Lewis! 'The Power of Love' still sounds as good today. What's your favourite Huey Lewis & The News track?

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating an 80s icon today! Huey Lewis turns 76. From 'Stuck With You' to 'Hip to Be Square', his hits are timeless.

moments.title: Marc Cohn turns 67
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Marc Cohn, best known for his 1991 hit 'Walking in Memphis', celebrates his 67th birthday today, July 5th.

angles.name: Walking in Memphis
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to Marc Cohn! The man who gave us 'Walking in Memphis' is celebrating today. What a classic!

angles.name: Singer-Songwriter
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 67th birthday to the brilliant singer-songwriter Marc Cohn. His tunes have a timeless quality.

moments.title: RZA turns 57
moments.blurb: Robert Fitzgerald Diggs, better known as RZA, the leader of the iconic hip-hop group Wu-Tang Clan, turns 57 today, July 5th.

angles.name: Wu-Tang Forever
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the one and only RZA! A true legend of hip-hop and the mastermind behind the Wu-Tang Clan. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Hip Hop Royalty
angles.copy: Celebrating RZA's 57th birthday today! The innovative producer and rapper continues to influence generations. Give it up for the Abbott!

moments.title: 50 Cent turns 51
moments.blurb: American rapper, actor, and businessman 50 Cent (Curtis Jackson III), known for hits like 'In Da Club', celebrates his 51st birthday on July 6th.

angles.name: Go Shorty, It's Your Birthday
angles.copy: Tomorrow, July 6th, 50 Cent turns 51! Get ready to celebrate a hip-hop legend. What's your favourite 50 Cent banger?

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 51st Birthday to 50 Cent for tomorrow! From 'Get Rich or Die Tryin'' to 'Power', he's done it all.

moments.title: John Keeble turns 67
moments.blurb: John Keeble, the drummer for iconic 80s New Romantic band Spandau Ballet, celebrates his 67th birthday on July 6th.

angles.name: True Gold
angles.copy: Tomorrow marks the 67th birthday of Spandau Ballet's very own John Keeble! Get ready to sing along to some 'True' classics.

angles.name: 80s Legend
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday for tomorrow to John Keeble! The beat behind one of the 80s most beloved bands, Spandau Ballet.

moments.title: Henley Festival kicks off
moments.blurb: The Henley Festival, a boutique music and arts event, begins on Wednesday, July 8th, running until July 12th, featuring acts like Boy George & Culture Club, Ezra Collective, Sugababes, and Lulu.

angles.name: Henley Week
angles.copy: Get ready for some glamour! Henley Festival starts this Wednesday, July 8th, with Boy George & Culture Club and Sugababes headlining. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Boutique Festival
angles.copy: Beyond the rowing, it's the Henley Festival! A week of incredible music, comedy, and arts kicks off on Wednesday. A truly unique summer experience.

moments.title: Buckingham Palace Summer Opening
moments.blurb: Buckingham Palace opens its State Rooms to visitors for its annual Summer Opening from Thursday, July 9th, until September 27th.

angles.name: Royal Day Out
angles.copy: Fancy a peek inside? Buckingham Palace opens its State Rooms to the public from Thursday, July 9th. A proper royal day out!

angles.name: Summer in the City
angles.copy: Explore the lavish State Rooms of Buckingham Palace as the Summer Opening begins on Thursday. A must-do for any London visitor or local!

moments.title: Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival
moments.blurb: The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival takes place in Moseley Park, Birmingham, from Friday, July 10th to Sunday, July 12th, celebrating innovative UK and international music.

angles.name: Birmingham Beats
angles.copy: Birmingham, get ready! The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival kicks off this Friday, July 10th, in Moseley Park. Who's on your must-see list?

angles.name: Weekend Grooves
angles.copy: Three days of incredible music are coming to Birmingham with the Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival starting Friday. Perfect for a summer weekend!

moments.title: Mavis Staples turns 87
moments.blurb: Legendary gospel and R&B singer Mavis Staples, a member of The Staple Singers and a solo artist, celebrates her 87th birthday on July 10th.

angles.name: Soul Sister
angles.copy: A very happy 87th birthday to the incredible Mavis Staples for Friday! A true icon of soul, gospel, and civil rights. What's your favourite Staple Singers track?

angles.name: Living Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the living legend Mavis Staples, who turns 87 on Friday. Her voice and message continue to inspire.

moments.title: Neil Tennant turns 72
moments.blurb: Neil Tennant, lead singer and co-founder of the iconic electronic pop duo Pet Shop Boys, celebrates his 72nd birthday on July 10th.

angles.name: West End Girls
angles.copy: It's a big birthday for Neil Tennant of the Pet Shop Boys this Friday, July 10th, as he turns 72! An absolute pioneer of synth-pop.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Icon
angles.copy: Happy 72nd Birthday for Friday to Neil Tennant! The voice behind countless Pet Shop Boys hits. What's your all-time favourite?

moments.title: Jason Orange turns 56
moments.blurb: Former Take That member Jason Orange, known for his dancing and vocals in the iconic boyband, celebrates his 56th birthday on July 10th.

angles.name: Take That's Jason
angles.copy: We're sending big birthday wishes to Jason Orange for Friday, July 10th, as he turns 56! Who remembers his iconic moves in Take That?

angles.name: Boyband Legend
angles.copy: Happy 56th Birthday for Friday to Jason Orange! From 'Relight My Fire' to 'Never Forget', his contributions to Take That are legendary.

moments.title: Bristol Pride Parade
moments.blurb: Bristol Pride culminates with its main parade and outdoor music and arts celebration on Saturday, July 11th, as part of events running since June 27th.

angles.name: Pride in Bristol
angles.copy: Bristol Pride's big parade and celebration is this Saturday, July 11th! Get ready for a vibrant day of music, arts, and community.

angles.name: Celebrating Love
angles.copy: Join the colourful celebrations at Bristol Pride this Saturday! A fantastic day for everyone to come together and spread the message of love and equality.

moments.title: Kaleidoscope Festival at Ally Pally
moments.blurb: Alexandra Palace's Kaleidoscope Festival returns on Saturday, July 11th, for a day of music, comedy, and arts with a view over London.

angles.name: Ally Pally Calling
angles.copy: Kaleidoscope Festival is back this Saturday, July 11th, at Alexandra Palace! Iconic views and an amazing line-up. Who's going?

angles.name: London Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Get your festival fix with a view! Kaleidoscope Festival takes over Ally Pally this Saturday for a day of music and good times.

moments.title: Suzanne Vega turns 67
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for her distinctive voice and hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', turns 67 on July 11th.

angles.name: Tom's Diner Day
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday for Saturday to the brilliant Suzanne Vega! 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner' are still on heavy rotation here. What's your favourite?

angles.name: Folk-Pop Queen
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 67th birthday to the iconic Suzanne Vega on Saturday! Her storytelling through song is truly captivating.

moments.title: Richie Sambora turns 67
moments.blurb: Richie Sambora, the former lead guitarist and co-songwriter for rock legends Bon Jovi, celebrates his 67th birthday on July 11th.

angles.name: Bon Jovi Legend
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday for Saturday to the incredible Richie Sambora! The guitar hero behind so many Bon Jovi anthems. What's your favourite riff?

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Richie Sambora's 67th birthday on Saturday! His contributions to rock music are immense. Livin' on a Prayer indeed!

moments.title: Lil' Kim turns 51
moments.blurb: Pioneering female rapper and style icon Lil' Kim (Kimberly Denise Jones) celebrates her 51st birthday on July 11th.

angles.name: Queen Bee's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday for Saturday to the one and only Queen Bee, Lil' Kim! A true game-changer in hip-hop and fashion.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Trailblazer
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 51st birthday to Lil' Kim on Saturday! From 'Crush on You' to 'Lady Marmalade', her influence is undeniable.

moments.title: Alessia Cara turns 30
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning Canadian singer-songwriter Alessia Cara, known for hits like 'Here' and 'Scars to Your Beautiful', celebrates her 30th birthday on July 11th.

angles.name: Happy 30th Alessia!
angles.copy: Big 3-0 for Alessia Cara on Saturday, July 11th! Wishing a very happy birthday to the incredible singer-songwriter.

angles.name: Pop Star Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 30th Birthday to Alessia Cara for Saturday! From 'Here' to 'Stay', her voice is unmistakable.

moments.title: Liz Mitchell turns 74
moments.blurb: Liz Mitchell, the lead singer of the hugely successful 70s disco and pop group Boney M., celebrates her 74th birthday on July 12th.

angles.name: Boney M. Star
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to Liz Mitchell, the iconic voice of Boney M., this Sunday! Get ready to 'Rasputin' your way into the weekend.

angles.name: Disco Queen
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 74th birthday to Liz Mitchell on Sunday! Her vocals on Boney M. hits defined an era.

moments.title: Gareth Gates turns 42
moments.blurb: British pop singer Gareth Gates, who rose to fame on Pop Idol and had hits like 'Unchained Melody' and 'Anyone of Us', turns 42 on July 12th.

angles.name: Pop Idol Legend
angles.copy: Happy 42nd Birthday to Gareth Gates this Sunday! From Pop Idol runner-up to chart-topping star, what a journey!

angles.name: Unchained Melody
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 42nd birthday to Gareth Gates on Sunday! Still remember 'Unchained Melody' hitting number one? What a voice!
